title: Attorney general considers review of jail sentence for Henry Nowak killer
summary_full: Office to look at 21-year minimum term as Hampshire police and crime commissioner calls for review of religious knife lawsUK politics live – latest updatesThe attorney general’s office is considering whether the sentence given to a man jailed for murdering Henry Nowak should be reviewed, as the killer’s family apologised to the teenager’s relatives and the Sikh community.Vickrum Digwa, 23, was sentenced on Monday to life in prison with a minimum term of 21 years for the murder of 18-year-old Henry Nowak. Continue reading...
